name: zweite-tools
description: Self-hosted Claude Code plugins for data tooling.

plugins.name: zeppelin
plugins.description: Run SQL / Spark / PySpark / shell paragraphs on Apache Zeppelin with built-in risk control.

plugins.name: starrocks
plugins.description: Run SQL against StarRocks over the MySQL protocol (pure-Python) with built-in risk control and a schema/sample cache.

plugins.name: mysql
plugins.description: Run SQL against MySQL over the MySQL protocol (pure-Python; native + caching_sha2 auth) with built-in risk control and a schema/sample cache.

plugins.name: mongodb
plugins.description: Query and inspect MongoDB collections (pymongo; supports Atlas SRV) with a mongo-aware risk classifier and a per-collection schema/sample cache. JSON-spec queries (find/aggregate/count/distinct/runCommand + writes).

plugins.name: alidocs
plugins.description: Move files between local disk and DingTalk / alidocs — fetch a doc / folder / whole knowledge base, or push / sync a local directory tree back up.
